outputs.description: The UUID of the device. VMwareWorkspaceONEUEM.OSUpdate.OSUpdateList.ProductKey The unique product key of the update.

outputs.name: VMwareWorkspaceONEUEM.OSUpdate.OSUpdateList.IsConfigurationDataUpdate
